title: Act 18 2025 - Act 18 2025 - Beneficial Ownership (Amendment) Act 2025
text:
[20th August 2 0 2 5 ] Bene ficial Ownership (Amendment) Act 328
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 18 of 2025)
ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS
SECTIONS
1. Short title
2. Amendment of section 2
3. Amendment of section 3
4. Amendment of First Schedule

[20th August 2 0 2 5 ] Bene ficial Ownership (Amendment) Act 329
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 18 of 2025)
I assent
Wavel Ramkalawan
President
8th August, 2025
AN ACT TO AMEND THE BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP ACT, 2020.
ENACTED BY THE PRESIDENT AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Beneficial Ownership (Amendment) Act,
2025.

[20th August 2 0 2 5 ] Bene ficial Ownership (Amendment) Act 330
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
Amendment of section 2
2. Section 2 of the Beneficial Ownership Act, 2020 (hereinafter
referred to as the “principal Act”) is amended as follows —
(1) in subsection (1), by repeaing paragraph (a)(vi) and
substituting therefor the following —
“(vi) a partnership under the Civil Code of Seychelles
Act (Cap.33), and any partnership formed,
incorporated, or otherwise established outside
Seychelles but conducting or carrying on business
within Seychelles; and”;
(2) in subsection (2), by repealing paragraph (b), and
substituting therefor the following —
“(b) (i) a legal person, not being a partnership, which is
formed, incorporated or established outside
Seychelles, unless such legal person is an
overseas company registered under the
Companies Act; or
(ii) a partnership formed, incorporated or
established outside Seychelles which is not
conducting or carrying on business within
Seychelles”.
Amendment of section 3
3. Section 3 of the principal Act is amended in the definition of
“resident agent” as follows —
(1) by repealing the word “or” in paragraph (f);
(2) by repealing the word “and” and substitutingtherefor the
word “or” in paragraph (g)
(3) by inserting immediately after paragraph (g), the following
paragraph —

[20th August 2 0 2 5 ] Bene ficial Ownership (Amendment) Act 331
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
“(h) a representative pursuant to paragraphs (c) and (h) of
Section 38(1) of the Revenue Administration Act in
relation to a partnership formed, incorporated or
established outside Seychelles but conducting or
carrying on business within Seychelles”.
Amendment of First Schedule
4. The First Schedule to the principal Act is amended in Part A, by
inserting immediately after item (c), the following new item —
“(d) A partner of a partnership formed, incorporated, or
otherwise established outside Seychelles but
conducting or carrying on business within
Seychelles”.
I certify that this is a correct copy of the Bill which was passed by the
National Assembly on Wednesday 6th August, 2025.
Mrs. Tania Isaac
Clerk to the National Assembly
